plugins.faceIDPermission: Aurora uses Face ID to confirm wagers and protect your wallet.

plugins.healthSharePermission: Aurora reads your steps and workouts to verify you hit your goals.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: Aurora writes nothing back to Health — it only reads.

plugins.photosPermission: Aurora uses your photos to attach proof to a bet.
plugins.cameraPermission: Aurora uses the camera to capture proof of completed bets.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Aurora records location during your active bet window so we can verify you were at the gym/court even if you forget to open the app.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Aurora reads your location to verify proof when you submit a bet.

infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Aurora reads your steps and workouts from Apple Health to verify you hit your goals.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Aurora does not write to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Aurora records location during your active bet window so we can verify you were at the gym/court even if you forget to open the app.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Aurora records location during your active bet window so we can verify you were at the gym/court even if you forget to open the app.
